rule_name: Windows - Credential Dumping via LSASS Memory Access
search_query: index=windows source="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventCode=10 TargetImage="C:\\Windows\\system32\\lsass.exe" (GrantedAccess="0x1fffff" OR GrantedAccess="0x1010") | table _time, Computer, SourceImage, TargetImage, GrantedAccess, SourceProcessId
description: Detects attempts to access the memory of the Local Security Authority Subsystem Service (LSASS). Attackers dump LSASS memory to steal cleartext passwords, NTLM hashes, and Kerberos tickets (e.g., using Mimikatz).
